text: A cozy living room. Alice is reading on the couch.

name: Alice
text: Hey Bob, did you see the news today? Apparently they found water on Mars.

name: Bob
text: No way! That's incredible. I've always wanted to visit Mars.
Alice laughs and throws a pillow at Bob.

name: Alice
text: You can barely handle a road trip to the beach, let alone Mars.

name: Bob
text: Fair point. But a man can dream, right?
